info.name: Sefaizo API - Professional
info.description: Postman collection for the Professional module: discovery, profile, services, availability, gallery and booking management.

request.description: List public professionals with optional filters: status, isVerified, location, page, limit.
Search professionals by name, bio or services.
Get public profile for one professional.
Get services for a professional. Set includeInactive=true to include soft-disabled services.
Get availability for one day or the full week when dayOfWeek is empty.
Get public gallery/portfolio items for a professional.
Get the authenticated professional profile.
Get profile completion percentage.
Create the professional profile.
Update the professional profile.
Admin only: verify a professional profile.
Admin only: suspend a professional profile.
Admin only: reactivate a suspended profile.
List active service categories for one professional. Public endpoint.
Create a category scoped to the authenticated professional.
Update one professional service category by id.
Delete a category. Services linked to it are reassigned to the default fallback category.
Create a service offering for the current professional.
Update a service offering.
Deactivate one service.
Reactivate one service.
Soft delete one service.
Set or update travel fee for a commune.
Set a day availability slot.
Update the schedule of one day.
Open, close or put a day on leave.
Set the same availability across the week.
Remove one day availability.
Upload a gallery item.
Update one gallery item.
Mark a gallery item as public.
Hide a gallery item from the public feed.
Reorder professional gallery items.
Soft delete a gallery item.
List professional bookings with optional status filter.
Confirm a booking.
Reject a booking with an optional reason.
Mark a booking as completed.
